title: Twitter
body: [![](http://assets2.twitter.com/images/twitter.png?1207461668)](http://twitter.com/xarop) I have been registered for some time on this social network that has been so successful lately. But until this last week I have not used it frequently thanks to the fact that this social network has spread like wildfire among family, friends and contacts of all kinds and that I use some of the tools that make it a fairly simple task. To do this, I recommend that you read this post from [Sincrono](http://sicrono.com), [Essential tools for Twitter](http://sicrono.com/herramientas/herramientas-esenciales-para-twitter/). So far I only follow 21 users (Folloging) and 13 follow me (Followers), not as many as the one who holds the record in Spain with more than 3000 Followers, [Enjuto Mojamuto](http://www.xarop.com/enjuto-mojamuto/) by Muchachada Nuí, a real phenomenon. Here you have my **[Twitter profile](http://twitter.com/xarop)** in case you know what I'm doing at all times (well what I'm doing or what I want you to think I'm doing, here's the secret of [Twitter](http://www.twitter.com)).
